title: Luisia inconspicua
taxonomy: Luisia inconspicua is a species of orchid. It belongs to the genus Luisia and the family Orchidaceae. The family Orchidaceae is a large group of flowering plants commonly known as orchids. The genus Luisia is a small group of orchids native to Asia. Luisia inconspicua is typically classified as a terrestrial orchid, indicating it grows in the ground rather than in trees or other environments.
